title: Man in the Room
description: This mod is a horror mod meant to scary you/Friends.
body:
This mod is a horror mod meant to scare you alone, or with your friends.

Mods in this pack.
_AMBIENT ENVIRONMENT_

_AMBIENTSOUNDS_

_CAVE DWELLER EVOLVED_

_COLD SWEAT_

_DISTANT FRIENDS_

_WEEPING ANGLES_

_FROM THE FOG_

_NYCTOPHOBIA DREAD_

_SANITY_

_THE MAN FROM THE FOG_

_THE MID NIGHT LURKER_

_WHISPERING SPIRITS_

_THE SILENCE_

_Sons of Sins: Wounds of Chaos_

_The Knocker_

_Zombies Reworked_

And many more Optimization mods..
